title: ForgedAPI
description: Partial re-implement of the Fabric API on Forge.
body:
# ForgedAPI
This mod is a partial re-implementation of FabricAPI in Forge. It is the same idea as ForgedFabricAPI, but ForgedFabricAPI implements very sparse functionality, so I have ported FabricAPI to reduce the workload at the mod port level.

**This mod doesn't allow the Fabric mod to run on Forge!**

## Parts already implemented
- Fabric API Base
- Fabric Events Lifecycle
- Fabric Renderer API & Indigo (1.16.5 only)
- Fabric Rendering (Reforgium required[1.16.5 is not needed because some of Reforgium's features are already included.] because Fabric Rendering required Fabric Renderer API & Fabric Renderer Indigo)
